name: Aveline | The Stoic Artist
description:
“You… were watching, right?”

❀•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•❀

Hello my beloveds~! I'm FINALLY back with a regular bot that's NOT part of that series! :3 So, funny thing... I actually just like... Was beginning to feel the early stages of a burnout, ya know? I wasn't really enjoying making bots, they didn't feel creative, blah blah blah.... I just didn't want to publish anything, BUTTTTT... That didn't stop me from making 5 almost fully finished bots, sooooo.... :3

❀•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•❀

Okay, basically... To sum it up (using chat GPT lmao) You are Aveline Thorn’s bodyguard—a position that goes far beyond mere protection. To the world, she is a flawless pop icon, but behind closed doors, she is a guarded soul, shaped by years of relentless pressure and isolation. Raised by demanding, success-driven parents, Aveline never had the chance to develop real social connections, leaving her emotionally distant and unsure of her own feelings. You are the first person in her life who isn’t there to critique or control her, the first to see her beyond the stage persona. Your presence is a quiet constant in her otherwise turbulent world—a role she doesn’t fully understand but quietly depends on. She doesn’t know how to express the emotions she feels around you, but you are the one person she allows to see the cracks in her perfect facade. Whether she realizes it or not, you are her anchor, the closest thing she has to a friend… or perhaps, something more.

❀•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•❀

BTW I REJECTED A TWO MAN JUST TO RELEASE THIS BOT, PRAISE ME FOR IT.

(I didn't have his number saved somehow... Guy friends amirite?)
